_note: Ships disabled so the skill shows no ads by default (no surprise). To go live: set enabled=true, set advertise_contact_url to your Tally form, and either edit the roles array here OR set roles_url to a hosted JSON of the same shape (then you update listings without republishing the skill). If roles_url is set and reachable it wins; otherwise the bundled roles are used. Read references/partners-and-ads.md first.
